prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 1NZ-FE (1.5L) with a forged internals kit from Tomei, including forged pistons (86mm bore, 8.5:1 compression), billet crankshaft, and H-beam connecting rods. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by HKS, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) peak boost.

ECU reflash using a Haltech Elite 1500 standalone unit with custom maps for E85 fuel, paired with a set of Denso Iridium IK22 spark plugs gapped at 0.028 inches. Install a custom intercooler kit by GReddy (Type-S) with a 60mm core and 2.5-inch piping, along with a Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump and 650cc injectors from Injector Dynamics (ID725).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Sirion's E102 chassis), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part numbers SPF0115K and SPF0116K for front/rear control arms), and a Cusco 22mm front sway bar (part number 661 542 A). Braking system upgrade to Endless CC-RG6 brake pads, DBA 4000 Series rotors (280mm front, 240mm rear), and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Sirion-specific, part number RB-SIRION-01) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Paint in Nissan GT-R Nismo Heritage Yellow (code: 46G) with matte black accents on the hood and roof.

Custom 17x8.5-inch Enkei PF05 wheels (ET35 offset) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (215/40R17). Rear wing upgrade to a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber wing from 9 Lives Racing (Sirion-specific, 1200mm width, dual-element design).

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Sirion-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (330mm diameter, suede grip). Shift knob replaced with a weighted aluminum unit from Cusco (part number 601 002 A) and custom carbon fiber trim panels from Seibon.
